subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! I beseech Thee by the wondrous dawning-places of the lights of Thy Beauty and the manifestations of the glory of Thy sovereignty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی اسئلک ببدایع اشراق انوار جمالک و ظهورات عز سلطنتک و
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @presence of; reunion with God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for protection
